feeds.title: More Than Just Code podcast - iOS and Swift development, news and advice
feeds.text: More Than Just Code podcast - iOS and Swift development, news and advice
feeds.description: MTJC podcast is a show about mobile development. Each week Jaime Lopez, Mark Rubin (sometimes Greg Heo and Tammy Coron) and myself, Tim Mitra, will convene from across the continent to discuss iOS and Mac development. We discuss current issues to find out what developers are talking about, what their apps are about, what they are using to create their apps and what advice they have for other developers (or those looking to become one). We also have news, notes and tech tips for developers.
